description: Per-MCP logging configuration — controls verbosity, redaction, output preview, and token tracking

pentest-ai.notes: Large tool catalog, verbose debug output helpful for initial integration

GhidraMCP.notes: Decompiled code output can be very large

shodan-mcp.notes: Small payloads, but API key must be redacted

burp-suite-mcp.notes: SSE transport — logging at proxy level

Wazuh-MCP-Server.notes: Enhanced logging for destructive tools — block_ip, isolate_host, kill_process

defense-mcp-server.notes: Enhanced logging for destructive tools — firewall rules, hardening actions

threat-hunting-mcp-server.notes: Splunk query results can be very large

Volatility-MCP-Server.notes: Memory dump output can be multi-MB — reduced preview size to protect memory

destructive_tools.description: Tools marked as destructive get DESTRUCTIVE_ACTION events with enhanced metadata

protocol_auto_detection.description: If a new/unknown MCP starts, ProcessProxy attempts to detect JSON-RPC format from first N messages
